issues.message: rail '+VDDIO' powers IC(s) ['U11'] but has no bypass cap on the net - confirm decoupling is on an adjacent rail/node
power 'GND' at (8300,10500) sits 90 mil from U20 body (< 100-mil gap; hang the power symbol off a stub, clear of the part)
R20 pin 1 at (7900, 9900) sits on a wire corner (the net turns 90deg at the terminal); move the bend off the pin and approach it with a straight stub
